_meta.notes: marjane.ma returns HTTP 403 for all direct requests (robots.txt also 403). Products sourced from Glovo/Marjane partner store pages (glovoapp.com/ma/*/marjane*) which publish live Marjane Market catalog with MAD prices. Robots.txt inaccessible - treated per RFC 9309 as no restrictions. Sources: Agadir, Casablanca, Bouskoura, Mohammedia, Tanger, Marrakech Marjane Market stores on Glovo. Errors: 3 category sub-pages returned 404 on Glovo (chiens dog food subcategory not found; Casablanca fruits page 404; Tetouan eaux-plates 404).
